The '''''Stellar Damsel''''' was a [[CR90 corvette/Legends|CR90 corvette]] in the [[Alliance Fleet/Legends|Alliance Fleet]].

==History==
Acquired early in the [[Galactic Civil War/Legends|Galactic Civil War]], the [[Corvette/Legends|corvette]] was occasionally used as a courier for data vital to the [[Alliance to Restore the Republic/Legends|Rebellion]]. On one such mission, [[Galactic Empire/Legends|Imperial]] agents tracked their stolen data to the ''Stellar Damsel'' and attacked the ship.

Though damaged, the crew managed to reach hyperspace before their [[Hyperdrive/Legends|hyperdrive]] ceased functioning. With Imperial forces in pursuit, they hid in the [[Miro asteroid field|Miro Asteroid Field]] and sent a distress call to the Alliance. The Alliance sent the [[YT-1300 light freighter/Legends|YT-1300 light freighter]] ''[[Knight Errant]]'' with a rescue team onboard, and the Rebel Fleet staged an attack on a [[Star Destroyer/Legends|Star Destroyer]] as a distraction.

Finding the ''Stellar Damsel'' in an asteroid cave, the rescue team fought off [[Mynock/Legends|mynocks]] and [[Zero-G assault stormtrooper|spacetroopers]] to reach the corvette. One of the survivors, [[Guro]], assumed the position of acting [[Captain/Legends|captain]] and followed as the ''Knight Errant'' led the corvette out of the field. After escaping a [[TIE/ln space superiority starfighter/Legends|TIE fighter]] patrol, the two ships returned to Alliance space with the critical [[Datacard/Legends|datacard]].
